question: What is the traditional greeting in Blimpton?

answers.ground_truth: 'Flurp be with you' while touching elbows
answers.original: The Blimptonian greeting involves touching elbows while saying 'Flurp be with you'.
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Yandr is one of the four moons of Quixar and is tidally locked to the planet.
Time-Locks create shimmering barriers that prevent temporal manipulation, contributing to stability.
The farmer grows corn in the field.
Shield generators protect against space debris and Floopy rays.
Lumin-Ink is traditionally used for inscribing sacred Xylotian texts.

entities.name: Blimpton
entities.description: Blimpton is a planet with a population of approximately 3.2 billion, a binary star system, and unique cultural and physical characteristics.

entities.name: Blimptonian Architecture
entities.description: Blimptonian architecture features inverted pyramids.

entities.name: Blimptonian Greeting
entities.description: The Blimptonian greeting involves touching elbows while saying 'Flurp be with you'.

entities.name: Plorgonian Dining Rituals
entities.description: Plorgonian dining rituals involve eating with the left hand only.

entities.name: Plorgonian Stew
entities.description: Plorgonian stew is a dish made primarily from fermented tubers of the Plorg plant.

relations.description: The Blimptonian greeting is a traditional practice in Blimpton.
Blimptonian architecture is a unique feature of Blimpton.
Blimptonian vehicles are a distinctive feature of Blimpton.
Blimptonian water has unique properties due to added minerals.
The Blimptonian government is a defining aspect of Blimpton's political system.
The Blimptonian week is a unique cultural aspect of Blimpton.
Blimptonian children have unique biological traits.
Plorgonian dining rituals involve specific customs when eating Plorgonian stew.
